important: EXT-03: services/atlas-channel/atlas.com/channel/socket/handler/character_info_request.go:66 swallows every atlas-mounts client error as 'no mount block' (no ErrNotFound distinction, no error log). Since atlas-mounts default-creates on first read, all reachable errors are transport/5xx failures being masked. Log/surface the non-404 error distinctly.
